# Unused functions in Display Commander addon (cppcheck --enable=unusedFunction)
# Generated by: python tools/find_unused_api.py build
# Then: grep unusedFunction <output> | grep display_commander | grep -v external
# Some may be false positives (callbacks, function pointers, or used from other TUs).
#
# Dead-code removal pass: complete. All symbols below were grep-verified; no further safe removals.
#
# Removed (verified no callers): RemoveSwapchain (globals), InitializeDisplayCache,
# GetTargetMonitorIndex (ui_display_tab), GetSuppressionSettingName, GetInstallationSettingName
# (hook_suppression_manager), SerializeActions/DeserializeActions (autoclick_action),
# display_cache GetCurrentDisplayInfoString/FindRefreshRateIndex/FindClosestRefreshRateIndex,
# display_initial_state GetFormattedString/IsCaptured, GetInputReport() method (dualsense hid_device_file_s),
# IsDownloadedVersionNewer, LogWarnDirect/LogErrorDirect, StartReshadeVersionDownload(version),
# GetUndestroyedGuardCount, StringToWString, ring_buffer GetSampleByAbsoluteIndex/GetCapacity.
# Plus: ui_colors no-arg PushSelectedButtonColors/PopSelectedButtonColors/PushNestedHeaderColors/PopNestedHeaderColors;
# input_remapping get_keyboard_name, get_vk_code_from_name, get_trigger_count;
# ui_colors no-arg PushIconColor(const ImVec4&), PopIconColor();
# display_initial_state InitialDisplayStateManager::Clear(), display_cache DisplayCache::Clear();
# display_cache SwapFrom, CopyDisplay, PrintVSyncFreqDivider, GetSupportedModes;
# display_cache GetCurrentDisplayInfo;
# query_display DisplayTimingInfo::GetFormattedString;
# standalone_ui_settings_bridge GetCurrentFps, GetLastSwapchainHwnd;
# standalone_ui_settings_bridge GetFpsLimiterMode, SetFpsLimiterMode, GetFpsLimit, SetFpsLimit, GetAudioMute, SetAudioMute, GetAudioVolumePercent, SetAudioVolumePercent, GetMuteInBackground, SetMuteInBackground, GetWindowMode, SetWindowMode, GetTargetDisplayDeviceId, SetTargetDisplayDeviceId;
# query_display DisplayTimingInfo GetPixelClockMHz, GetHSyncFreqHz, GetHSyncFreqKHz, GetVSyncFreqHz;
# hotkeys_tab ParsedHotkey::ToArray, ParsedHotkey::FromArray, kHotkeyArraySize.
# new_ui_tabs TabManager::GetActiveTab, TabManager::SetActiveTab.
# settings DisplaySettings (entire module removed: display_settings.cpp, display_settings.hpp unused; g_display_settings never referenced).
# audio GetChannelVolumeForCurrentProcess (single-channel getter; GetAllChannelVolumesForCurrentProcess used instead).
#
# Verification pass (plan per-function tasks): All remaining candidates in lines 31-65
# were grep-verified for callers in src/addons/display_commander. Every symbol has at
# least one caller (in-tree or as ReShade/callback registration). No additional removals.
# Re-ran find_unused_api.py (cppcheck) after display_settings removal: same candidates;
# ui_display_tab FindMonitorIndexByDeviceId reported but has callers (monitor_settings, window_management).
